sequences.description: Large H1 heading 'Tailored for the Road Ahead', paragraph about Bridgestone tire solutions, two CTA buttons (Start Tire Search, Find a Dealer Nearby), with full-width background tire/road image
sequences.reason: Classic hero pattern with background image, heading, text, and CTA buttons. Obvious match with hero block.

sequences.description: Horizontal tab-style navigation bar with 5 links: Start Tire Decision Guide, Tire Search, Offers, Support, Bridgestone Motorcycle
sequences.reason: Secondary navigation links that can be authored as default content. Simple row of anchor links.

sequences.description: Two side-by-side category cards — Automotive Tires and Motorcycle Tires — each with large image, H5 heading, description paragraph, and two action link buttons
sequences.reason: Two structured items with images and text in a grid. Repeating pattern with consistent structure. Obvious cards match.

sequences.description: Side-by-side layout: left has H4 heading 'Automotive Tire Recommendations, with Tire Decision Guide', description with bold text, red CTA button 'Start Tire Guide', checklist item; right has large product image
sequences.reason: Side-by-side layout with text content on one side and image on the other. Obvious columns match.
Just a section heading. Author types it.

sequences.description: Bento grid layout with 6 cells: large card with 'Dealers Near You' text overlay + image, landscape road image, highway image, 'Quality Products' card with CTA, 'Bridgestone E8 Commitment' card with CTA + image
sequences.reason: Multiple structured items with images and text in a grid layout. Best represented as cards block with custom bento-style variant.

sequences.description: Section header: H3 heading 'Tire Offers and Promotions' on left, 'More Special Offers' link on right, followed by horizontal separator
sequences.reason: Heading, link, and horizontal rule can be authored as default content.

sequences.description: Three promotional offer cards: (1) Spring Motorcycle promo $70 back with image, dates, details, CTA; (2) March Auto promo $180 back with image, dates, details, CTA; (3) CFNA Financing card with image, description, two CTAs
sequences.reason: Three structured promotional items with images, headings, descriptions, CTAs. Repeating card pattern.

sequences.description: Side-by-side layout: left has large sustainability image, right has H4 'What Really Matters', H6 'Sustainable Solutions for Future Generations', paragraph about E8 Commitment, two red CTA buttons (Mission and Values, Sustainable Solutions)
sequences.reason: Side-by-side layout with image on one side and text+CTAs on the other. Obvious columns match.

sequences.description: Section header: H3 heading 'What's New' on left, 'Frequently Asked Questions' link on right, followed by horizontal separator
sequences.reason: Heading, link, and horizontal rule can be authored as default content.

sequences.description: Three article/blog cards: (1) 'Summer Tires vs. All Season Tires' with image, category, read time, description; (2) 'Run Flat Tires: How They Work' same structure; (3) 'Motorcycle Tire Maintenance' same structure
sequences.reason: Three structured article items with images, headings, category tags, descriptions. Classic cards pattern.

sequences.description: Centered row: 'Learn: Automotive' button link on left, H6 text 'Discover why your journey is our passion.' in center, 'Learn: Motorcycle' button link on right
sequences.reason: Links and centered text. Author can type these as default content with centered alignment.

sequences.description: Two side-by-side support cards: (1) 'Find the Essentials / Automotive Support' with eyebrow, heading, description, red CTA; (2) 'Keep Your Edge / Motorcycle Support' with same structure plus two CTAs
sequences.reason: Two structured items with consistent pattern (eyebrow, heading, description, CTAs). Cards pattern.

sequences.description: Centered section with small icon/badge at top, H5 'Have a Question? Contact Us!', paragraph about experts + dealer link, paragraph with toll-free phone number, red CTA button 'Contact Bridgestone Service Center'
sequences.reason: Centered text content with heading, paragraphs, links, and CTA button. Author can type all of this normally.

blockStructures.hero: Row 1: background image. Row 2: heading, subheading, paragraph, CTA links
blockStructures.cards: Each row = one card. Col 1: image. Col 2: heading, description, CTA link
blockStructures.columns: Each row = set of side-by-side cells. Each cell can contain text, images, or inline elements
